name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Republicans don’t care that Trump tried to overturn the election after he lost.  All that matters to them is that he failed.  Now many states are making it easier to overturn future elections, no actual evidence of fraud required.  Pay attention, folks. Our democracy is at risk.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: If we end the filibuster, we can strengthen voting rights, pass universal background checks, raise the minimum wage, and more.   We can protect our democracy, and we can make progress on the urgent issues Americans elected us to address.   Let's get it done. End the filibuster.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Eliminating the filibuster won't mean the end of minority views.   That's what our system of checks and balances is for.   But a filibuster that has frozen our ability to pass overwhelmingly popular reforms isn’t a healthy check and balance –   It’s a roadblock to progress.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Simply put, America is at a tipping point.   It’s not tenable for the will of the majority of the voters to be continually thwarted by an archaic rule.  We need to end the filibuster so we can protect and strengthen our democracy.  So we can make progress — and make it lasting.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The filibuster has a shameful legacy:   In the 1960s, segregationists used it to block civil rights legislation, including anti-lynching laws.   And today, Republicans are using it block progress on everything from preventing gun violence to protecting voting rights, and more.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The filibuster is an arcane Senate rule requiring 60 votes instead of a simple majority to end debate on a piece of legislation and bring it to a vote.  And while the filibuster has a long history, it's not written in the Constitution.  Here's why we should end it:

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Senate Republicans blocked the creation of a bipartisan commission to investigate the January 6 insurrection, despite the fact that a majority of Senators — and a majority of Americans — support it.   How? Two words: The filibuster.   THREAD:

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Republicans aren't being honest about the Jan. 6 commission.   It's bipartisan, with equal members from both parties. Subpoenas require a bipartisan vote. We agreed to Republicans' 2021 deadline.   Their sham complaints distract from the real motive:   To hide the truth.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: As we monitor devastating reports of another mass shooting in San Jose, my heart goes out to the victims and their loved ones.   How much longer will we force every American to live in fear they'll be gunned down at work, at school, at the store?   It doesn't have to be this way.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: This week:   An American journalist was detained in Myanmar. Belarus hijacked a commercial flight to detain a journalist. And an Uzbek blogger was arrested on trumped-up extortion charges.  The free press is critical to global democracy—and it’s under assault. We must protect it.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Marjorie Taylor Greene made herself a GOP star.   By creating chaos for clicks. Seeking money using racist, homophobic, antisemitic language. Spewing nonsense and hate.  Her actions are only a sign of the greater rot in her party.   It won’t stop until people stop rewarding them.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The lengths that autocrats will go to destroy the free press are clear.  Even forcing down an international flight in order to arrest a journalist.  The international condemnation must be swift and strong. This cannot stand.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Q: The Justice Dept is:  🔘 The president’s personal lawyer who can harass the press and his enemies  🔘 A Get Out of Jail Free card for the president’s corrupt friends  🔘 An independent agency to ensure no one is above the law  Unless you’re in Trump’s DOJ, the answer is clear.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: American personnel around the world have reported concerning health incidents, sometimes called "Havana Syndrome."   Our bipartisan bill will ensure they get the resources needed to recover.  We will get to the bottom of these incidents and we will protect and support our people.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: On Jan 6, violent insurgents attacked our Capitol and the heart of our democracy.   Investigating it must be a bipartisan imperative.  But Trump's GOP is loyal only to him— not our democracy or Constitution.  Make no mistake: We will have a full accounting. With or without them.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: McCarthy wants to block a bipartisan commission on the Jan. 6 insurrection.   It’s clear why:   He doesn’t want to disclose what he discussed with Trump that day.   Or let Americans learn more about congressional Republicans’ complicity in the attempt to overturn our democracy.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The vast majority of Americans are united behind a woman’s right to make her own health care choices.   These private decisions belong to women, not justices on a court or partisan members of Congress.  Roe, and women’s health, must be protected.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: House Republicans this week:  "There's no evidence this was an armed insurrection" “You would actually think it was a normal tourist visit"  Americans saw the violence and destruction unfold live on TV.  But Republicans are waging a blatant assault on the truth and our democracy.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: We've got a choice to make:   Do we want a historic investment in families and infrastructure? A modern green economy that lifts everyone up?   Or do we want to let corporations avoid paying their fair share in taxes?   It’s really that simple. I know my answer.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: During Trump's first impeachment, I asked a simple question:  Is there one among you who will say 'enough'?  Romney voted his conscience and was booed. Cheney refused to echo Trump's Big Lie and was ousted.  Soon there will be no one left in Trump’s GOP to speak the truth.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Did you know that Louis DeJoy, Trump's hand-picked head of the USPS, is still in charge? And still sabotaging our postal system?   @POTUS has worked to remove DeJoy, but Senate Republicans are blocking any progress.   We rely on a strong USPS. It’s past time for DeJoy to go.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: House Republicans just ousted Liz Cheney from leadership.   Because they’re now the party of lies, with one lie bigger than the rest.   She stated a simple fact: The election was not stolen.   In a party that places loyalty to Trump over principle, there is no room for the truth.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Today, Eli and I planted some flowers around the mailbox — our Mother’s Day tradition.  It will be our last Mother’s Day before Eli goes to college and we have an empty nest. Wish us luck!  Happy Mother’s Day!  https://t.co/s0MtfgZX6f

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: It's the same darn playbook:  Mitch McConnell in 2010: "The single most important thing we want to achieve is for President Obama to be a one-term president."  McConnell in 2021: "100% of my focus is on stopping this new administration."  Political cynicism at its worst.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The fix was in from the very beginning.  Bill Barr made the Justice Department into Trump’s private law firm. Destroying its independence, deceiving the public, and undermining the rule of law.  Leaving DOJ’s reputation in tatters. And damage that will take years to repair.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: There's no Constitutional protection for using social media to incite an insurrection.  Trump is willing to do anything for himself no matter the danger to our country.  His big lies have cost America dearly.  And until he stops, Facebook must ban him.  Which is to say, forever.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Universal pre-K. Free community college. Paid family and medical leave. Raising the minimum wage. Modernized public transit. Historic investments in green jobs.   America is on the move.   Again.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: This #WorldPressFreedomDay, let's strengthen our commitment to protecting journalists.  I introduced a bill to ensure the US holds to account governments and individuals that perpetrate gross human rights abuses against journalists.  A free press is essential for a free society.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Republicans in Congress are grasping at straws, because Biden's proposals are so popular.  Do they really want to say they're for lead in our pipes? Against universal pre-K, or the ability to care for a sick loved one?  We're moving forward. They can help— or get out of the way.  https://t.co/9igtqilORB

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The #AmericanFamiliesPlan:   👶Extend the child tax credit 🏫Free universal preschool 👩‍👩‍👧‍👧Paid family & medical leave 🍼 Subsidized childcare 🏥 Lower health insurance premiums   Investing in American families is an investment in America's future.  And we're just getting started.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: We have an unprecedented opportunity:  To modernize our economy.  To invest in our people.  To fight racial injustice.  To make healthcare a human right.  To create green jobs.  To end gun violence.  To strengthen our democracy.  Tonight, I’m hopeful. Tomorrow, we work.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: We can end child poverty in America:   ✔️ Extend the child tax credit and put money in parents' pockets. ✔️ Free universal preschool.   We can restore the promise and opportunity of the American dream for every family.   We just need the political will to act.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Barr’s Justice Department allowed political influence to infect decisions on warrants, charging and sentencing.  This must be a thing of the past. With Attorney General Garland, it will be.  Everyone should expect equal treatment under the law—  Even a former president’s lawyer.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: .@POTUS' recognition of the Armenian Genocide comes after decades of struggle.  After years of Turkish threats and intimidation  After a murderous war on the people of Artsakh  After so many heartbreaks and disappointments  Thank you, President Biden, for speaking truth to power.  https://t.co/1G9BY28kVn

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: It's time for DC statehood.  DC's 700,000+ residents, who pay more in federal taxes than 22 states, deserve full representation. This is about racial justice. It's about strengthening our democracy.  But at its core, DC statehood is about fairness. Plain and simple.  I voted YES.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Mitch McConnell's plan for America:  Modernizing roads and bridges? Never. Expanding access to broadband? Never. Building energy efficient, affordable homes? Never. Investing in public transit? Never.   Republicans in Congress — too busy doing (???) to plan for America's future.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: George Floyd’s murder was a terrible tragedy.   No verdict can bring him back or other Black Americans who died from police brutality.   But accountability can be a catalyst for change.  Justice will take time, and the end of systematic racism even longer.   That work goes on.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Climate change is real and we must act.  For too long, our heads have been stuck in the sand and our politics at loggerheads. But we can create a different future:  Green jobs. A modern economy. Net zero emissions. And much more.  That’s why I’m co-sponsoring the #GreenNewDeal.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: An open letter to @POTUS:   This week, the world will mark the 106th anniversary of the Armenian Genocide.   This is the first April 24 of your presidency, your first chance to keep your promise to hundreds of thousands of Armenian Americans:   Recognize the Armenian Genocide.  https://t.co/5FOl8z2rwl

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: America has a proud legacy as a nation that welcomes refugees fleeing violence and deprivation.  Trump betrayed that legacy, restricting refugees to an historically low level.   We have an opportunity to change that, and we must seize it.  Lift the cap, Mr. President.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The Russia sanctions confirm what we've long known:   Trump’s campaign chairman shared internal polling data and strategy with Konstantin Kilimnik - who shared it with Russian intelligence.   While Russia was helping Trump’s campaign.   So much for the “no collusion” crowd.  https://t.co/AN8Rv4pWOs

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Republicans keep saying that Democrats need to “come to the table” on an infrastructure bill.  But they’ve also said that paying for it by restoring corporate or fossil fuel taxes is “off the table.”  So what’s “on the table” for Republicans, exactly?  Just more empty rhetoric.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Some of the troops who are serving in Afghanistan today were not yet born on 9/11.  And after 20 years of war, of death and of loss, a continued military presence there is no longer in our best interest.  This decision isn’t without risk, but it's the right one.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: We must enact commonsense gun violence preventions. Now.   And if Senate Republicans are too beholden to the NRA to protect their own constituents, then it's time to end the filibuster and get it done ourselves.   Lives are hanging in the balance. It's past time to act. Enough.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Infrastructure is roads and bridges, yes.   But it's also ensuring that those roads connect our families and communities:   Safe, affordable homes. Expanded broadband. Clean drinking water. Green energy.   Infrastructure is about building a modern economy that lifts everyone up.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The NRA will fight tooth and nail to preserve the gun industry’s unjustifiable legal immunity.   But we don’t have to let them win.   I have a bill to end this obscene liability shield—that no other industry enjoys—so gun violence victims get their day in court.   Let's act. Now.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: COVID-19 has wrought unprecedented economic devastation, but as we recover, we have the opportunity to build back better:   A modern, green economy that works for everyone.  Join me & @RBReich LIVE to discuss the path forward tomorrow at 7pm ET/ 4pm PT:  https://t.co/J5tk6CRMgj  https://t.co/lC8KisyDpi

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: McConnell thinks corporations should stay out of politics. Especially on the "highly incendiary issue" of... the right to vote.  But McConnell also asks corporations to pour money into Republican political campaigns so they can suppress voters and stay in power.  How convenient.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: My heart goes out to Officer Billy Evans’ family, especially his two beautiful children.  @CapitolPolice have endured so much. But they continue to show up every day to protect not just a building, but the democracy it represents.  Rest In Peace, Officer.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Wishing you a very Happy Easter!    May the hopeful spirit of this holiday bring you and your loved ones meaningful reflection and celebration.   And of course, if you're gathering in person, make sure to stay safe. Mask up, distance, and enjoy the Spring weather!

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: I’m horrified that tragedy has again struck the Capitol, and a US Capitol Police officer has been killed and another injured.  And I am heartbroken for Capitol Police, who have already endured so much.  My thoughts are with the entire department, the officers, and their families.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Here’s what you may have missed in the #AmericanJobsPlan:  ⚡️Invest in electric cars with 500,000 chargers nationwide by 2030 🏡Build & retrofit 200 million+ energy efficient affordable homes 💻Expand universal broadband  We can build a modern, green economy, lifting everyone up.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Republicans are rushing to make it harder to vote—especially for communities of color—in Georgia and across the country.   Democrats are fighting to protect and expand the vote.   Not just for "our" voters, but for all Americans.   It's a fight for the very soul of our democracy.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Republicans know that H.R. 1 is widely popular, even with conservatives.   So McConnell is arranging private meetings with the Koch Brothers to figure out how to kill the bill.   ... Exactly the kind of dark money influence and lack of accountability that H.R. 1 will root out.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Wishing a Chag Pesach Sameach to all who are celebrating the first night of Passover this evening.   While far too many families across America are facing empty chairs at their seder tables, I hope that you find peace, joy, and meaningful reflection.  Next year, in person!

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: No one should be held behind bars while awaiting a trial just because they can't afford bail.   Pre-trial detention for minor, nonviolent offenses can have a domino effect – job loss, poverty, and homelessness. That doesn't make anyone safer.   No more. Poverty is not a crime.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: After losing Georgia, the GOP wasted no time.  Working so hard to suppress the vote, they made it a crime to give water to a voter waiting in line.  And it's not just Georgia, with 250+ voter suppression bills nationwide.  If they bring back Jim Crow, our democracy can't succeed.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump's Postmaster General Louis DeJoy is still at it with new ways to sabotage the USPS:   Shorter hours. Slower delivery. Higher rates.   Veterans, elderly, small businesses and more rely on USPS to get medications, conduct business and stay connected.   DeJoy must go. Now.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Sandy Hook. Parkland. El Paso. Orlando. Las Vegas. Atlanta. Boulder.  This awful list keeps growing. No more. We must act:  Universal background checks. Ban assault weapons & extended clips. And more.  We have the power. Not the NRA.  So let’s act. Before another tragedy strikes.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Americans send representatives to Washington to solve problems and enact change.  It is simply not tenable for the will of the voters to be continually thwarted by an archaic practice.  I believe it's time to eliminate the filibuster once and for all.   Here's why:  https://t.co/eGuksaceJ5

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: As horrifying reports continue to emerge from Colorado, my heart is with the victims, their families, and the Boulder community.  Once again, a gunman has turned a public space into a site of tragedy.  We don’t have to live in fear like this. We must pass commonsense gun reforms.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: I'm proud to be an original cosponsor of Medicare for All.   Healthcare is a human right: ✔️Universal coverage. ✔️Lower costs. ✔️No barriers to treatment.   No matter who you are. No matter what you do for work. No matter what you can afford.   It's time for #MedicareForAll.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Words have meaning, and hateful rhetoric leads to tragic consequences.   Hate crimes against Asian Americans are up dramatically, and just yesterday we saw the murder of several Asian victims in Atlanta.   We must all speak out against violent anti-Asian attacks and hate speech.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: This intelligence report confirms:  - Russia interfered in the 2020 election by spreading misinformation to hurt Biden and help Trump. - Russia successfully reached individuals close to Trump.  Our best defense?  Americans must reject foreign interference, no matter who it helps.  https://t.co/WNxoEgWyRd

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: 🚨PSA🚨  The passage of the American Rescue Plan means millions will receive $1400 relief payments.  To receive your check as quickly as possible, file your 2020 taxes electronically so that the IRS has your income and direct deposit information on file.  Don’t wait, do it today!

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: This week, I voted for:   💸The #AmericanRescuePlan to help working families survive this crisis, ⚖️The #JusticeInPolicingAct to address police brutality, 💪The #PROAct to protect labor unions, & 🛑2 bills to strengthen background checks on gun sales.  We're building back better.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: I would like to personally welcome our new @HouseIntel members:  @RepJasonCrow, @RepJimCooper, @RepBrianFitz, @RepTrentKelly, @RepLahood, and @RepMullin  We have much to do to keep our country safe. Looking forward to our work together.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: He would have been — should have been — an extraordinary Supreme Court Justice.  Now Merrick Garland will be a great Attorney General.  As a former Assistant U.S. Attorney, I couldn’t be happier for DOJ or the country.  Nice to see when good things happen to good people.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: America's children have never known life without fear of school shootings.  But we are not powerless to address gun violence.  That’s why I voted YES to expand federal background check requirements.  The Senate must pass these commonsense bills. Our children deserve nothing less.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The American Rescue Plan is heading to @POTUS' desk for his signature. Not a moment too soon.   $1,400 relief checks. Extended unemployment benefits. Funding to increase vaccinations, keep people in their homes, reopen schools, and cut child poverty in half.  Help is on the way.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The 40 hour work week. Minimum wage. Health benefits. Ending child labor.  These workplace protections are all thanks to labor.   Many large corporations seek to undermine their right to organize.   I just voted YES on the PRO Act. No one working full time should live in poverty.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Republican legislators in Georgia are responding to their election loss by trying to make it more difficult to vote.  It's an egregious attack on our democracy.   These suppression efforts will disenfranchise millions, particularly people of color.  That's exactly the intention.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The Senate just passed COVID relief.   ✔️ $1,400 relief checks. ✔️ Funding for vaccines. ✔️ Money to reopen schools. ✔️ Food, unemployment, and rental assistance. ✔️ Cutting child poverty in half. ✔️ Help for small businesses.   We must end this pandemic. And help is on the way.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: As part of a 2019 study, Stockton, CA provided $500 a month to 125 low income families.   It increased productivity, employment, and improved health. And it didn’t disincentivize work.  Getting help to people who need it makes their lives better, and our communities stronger.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The House passed our relief bill. Let's check in on the Senate, shall we?   🧐: @SenateGOP is deploying ridiculous tactics just to delay action.  Unemployment runs out in 10 days. We need funding for vaccinations and Americans need relief.   Cut the theater, pass the bill now.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: For 4 years, Donald Trump undermined our democracy and the right to vote.  Showing us just how fragile our system really is.  There's no guarantee that our democracy will endure. Not unless we protect it and make it stronger.  That's why I'm voting YES on the #ForThePeople Act.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: I voted YES on the Justice in Policing Act in honor of George Floyd. Police brutality, particularly against Black Americans, has persisted far too long.  This bill will ban chokeholds, end qualified immunity and fund community-led safety initiatives.  Police must be accountable.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: H.R. 1 will:  🗳Expand automatic & same day voter registration, vote by mail & early voting. Stop partisan gerrymandering. Protect elections from foreign interference. 💰Reign in dark money & special interests. ⚖️Enforce ethics rules for officials.  We must protect our democracy.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Now in the second year of this pandemic, we’re all tired and anxious.  But there’s reason for hope.   A third vaccine is approved. Johnson & Johnson's is easier to produce and distribute.  There will be enough supply to vaccinate every American adult by late May.   Hang in there.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Russia has undermined international security and violated human rights for far too long:   Invading and annexing Crimea. Interfering in elections. Targeting dissidents and activists.   These sanctions send an important message: No more.   The U.S. will stand up to Putin’s Russia.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Late last night, I voted YES on the COVID relief package.  Relief checks. Funding for vaccines and reopening schools. Food, unemployment and rental assistance.  These measures are urgently necessary. And incredibly popular.  The Senate must act. There’s no time to waste.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Congress will be voting late tonight, possibly into the early morning, on the $1.9 trillion COVID relief bill.  But across America, millions stay up late every night wondering how they’re going to make ends meet.  We have to stay until we get this done. And we will.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The Biden Administration should ensure that repercussions for the brutal murder of Khashoggi go beyond those who carried it out, to the one who ordered it.   The Crown Prince has blood on his hands. The blood of an American resident and journalist.   We must have accountability.  https://t.co/99poiTPX30

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Senators arguing against raising the minimum wage make $174,000 a year.   The minimum wage is now $7.25 an hour, or $15,000 a year.   That’s not a living wage. Raising it to $15 will lift millions out of poverty.   Americans don’t care how it gets done, just that we do it. ASAP.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The House just voted to protect 1.5 million acres of wilderness, including my bill to preserve 191,000 acres in Southern California's Rim of the Valley.  The magic of LA is in the open space that connects us.  These pristine public lands must be protected for generations to come.  https://t.co/au8evZx3Bd

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: For two years, we pushed for the truth to be made public:   The highest levels of the Saudi government, including Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman, are responsible for the brutal murder of Jamal Khashoggi.   There must be accountability, and we will continue to press for it.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: One easy way to help prevent the spread of COVID-19 is to provide free, high-quality masks to all Americans.  I’ve been urging this since early last year, and I’m pleased the new Administration is taking the lead.  The faster we act, the quicker we defeat the virus. Mask up.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Millions of LGBTQ Americans face employment, housing, and healthcare discrimination just because of who they love, how they identify, and where they live.  This must stop.  We just passed the #EqualityAct to attack these injustices. Now the Senate must act.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Here’s what's in the COVID relief package:   Direct checks to families Unemployment assistance Money to reopen schools Vaccine funding Food aid $15 minimum wage Child care funding Rental assistance Eviction moratorium   All popular. All necessary. All urgent. Let’s get it done.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Last May as we approached 100,000 COVID deaths, it seemed unfathomable.  Now we have crossed an even more grim milestone: 500,000 lives lost.  Precious few have escaped this virus' grief and devastation.  We are together in our mourning. And we must be together in our rebuilding.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Democracy is under assault, and autocracy is on the march. As @POTUS said, “democracy doesn’t happen by accident.”   It takes each of us, working each day, to defend, strengthen, and renew it – both here at home, and around the world.   And it is always worth the struggle.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Mr. President, if you'll indulge me a moment as a proud representative...   The Perseverance Rover was built and designed at @NASAJPL in La Cañada, CA.  And once it's safe, we'd love to invite you and @VP Harris for a tour of the incredible facility that just put a rover on Mars.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: I just (virtually) joined hundreds of local students,   Watching for a tiny rover, constructed in our community, to land on the Red Planet.  At a time when good news has been hard to find, we got word:  Perseverance made it safely to Mars.  And I couldn’t be prouder of @nasajpl.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: .@POTUS should cancel $50,000 in student loan debt for all.  For 10 years, my student loan debt payments were more than my rent.  Student debt affects everybody, and particularly people of color, making it hard to buy a home or start a family.  Our economy should work for all.  https://t.co/MQOHQgARWk

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Some say that the remedy of impeachment is flawed, an unworkable mistake of the founders.   That’s nonsense.   There is nothing wrong with the Constitution, its draftsmanship, or the oath.   Only with those who need uphold it.   The fault lies not in our laws, but in ourselves.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The House Managers upheld their oaths with skill and passion.  Our eternal thanks to @RepRaskin, @RepDianaDeGette, @davidcicilline, @JoaquinCastrotx, @RepSwalwell, @RepTedLieu, @StaceyPlaskett, @RepJoeNeguse and @RepDean.   The case they made will stand the test of history.  https://t.co/Tk7l8QJ14s

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Watching McConnell’s harsh indictment of Donald Trump for his lies and incitement, for his lack of remorse and dereliction of duty,  I couldn’t help but think of how much McConnell indicts himself for an even greater dereliction of duty:  Failing to hold Trump accountable.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: GOP Senators showed us their party is still in Trump’s thrall, more devoted to him than to America’s ideals.  Yet, I remain hopeful.  America was built by those who believed in something never seen before — a government of the people.  It will be rebuilt with the same faith.  https://t.co/H87VsvySLg

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: What is it going to take for Republicans to hold Trump accountable?   If they fail to do their duty, they’ll have to answer to history.   Senators must demonstrate courage. And if they don't?   We will have the specter of Donald Trump hanging over us for years to come.  https://t.co/mqIQiVAwQy

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump’s defense:  Phony jurisdiction argument.  Claim Trump has a First Amendment right to violate his oath.  It’s not an insurrection if it fails.  He can’t incite if people came ready to be incited.  Even defending his election lies.  ...It’s hard to defend the indefensible.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump’s lawyers can’t contest the facts, so they’re making a false claim about the First Amendment.  Let's be clear: Trump has no First Amendment right to violate his oath of office.  No more than a fire chief has the right to tell arsonists to burn down the station.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: .@RepRaskin posed four questions for Trump's lawyers to answer:  —Why did Trump not tell his supporters to stop?  —Why did he do nothing to stop the attack?  —Why did he do nothing to help?  —Why did he not condemn the attack on January 6th?  What will be their answer?

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: As people lay dead and injured, our Capitol desecrated, Trump tweeted at 6:01 pm:   “These are the things and events that happen when a sacred landslide election victory is so unceremoniously & viciously stripped away...”   Trump was knowing, willful, and remorseless.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The release of Saudi women's rights activist Loujain al-Hathloul is an important, but long overdue, development.   Loujain’s torture and three-year imprisonment was an outrage, and she should be freed from restrictions on her speech and travel by Saudi authorities.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: In his choice of date, time, and place, Trump knew exactly what he was doing.  Trump directed his mob at the Capitol, Vice President Pence, and the Joint Session of Congress.  We can only hope that Senators have their eyes open. But we know that the nation is watching.  https://t.co/AphHvTjhoe

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: One cannot watch the powerful evidence assembled, and not acknowledge a simple truth:  Trump incited a mob to attack the peaceful transfer of power.  We lived through it. And now all Americans are seeing the chilling details.  Senators dare not look away or fail to do their duty.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: There are worse things than losing an election.   Not upholding our duty to the Constitution. Failing to show courage, and regretting it.  We know Trump will continue to lie and cheat. He can put this country through hell again.  Senators have the power to stop that.  Use it.  https://t.co/ZtvedacX4d

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The defense case was weak and convoluted, to say the least.  Yet 44 Republican Senators still voted to avoid a trial, rather than confront the facts.  But there is no hiding from our Constitutional duty.  If we condone, excuse or shield Trump’s misconduct, we invite it again.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The House Managers’ opening statement was flawless and irrefutable.   A seamless weaving of powerful video, Constitutional arguments, and history.   @RepRaskin’s emotional appeal moved anyone not made of stone.   Hard to imagine a more perfect presentation.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump spent months telling lies about the election and trying to overturn the results.   When all else failed, he called his supporters to DC and incited them to attack the Capitol. They did.  Trump is responsible for the most serious attack on our democracy in American history.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: It’s just common sense:  Presidents must be accountable for their offenses, whether they occur on the first day of their term or the last.  Our Founders agreed. The history of the impeachment power agrees. There’s no “January exemption.”  Trump must be convicted.  https://t.co/1yc22H8O2p

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: But enough about Britain.   In 1876, the U.S. Secretary of War William Belknap was impeached for accepting a bribe.  He was impeached *while* he was in office. He faced trial *after* he left office. The Senate voted 37-29 that former officials could be tried.  Sound familiar?

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The Founders accepted this view of impeachment, and adopted it when drafting our Constitution.   They also recognized that impeachment had to have “teeth,” so no one could escape accountability by leaving office.  Disqualification from future office was always essential!  https://t.co/cTvDzFmU1J

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Parliament impeached the former Lord Chancellor in 1725 for acts of bribery during his term.  And in 1787, while America's Founders met to draft our Constitution, Warren Hastings of Britain was impeached for abuses he committed while Governor-General of Bengal.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Our Founders didn’t invent impeachment from scratch. Oh no.  According to Hamilton, they looked to Britain which provided “the model from which the idea of this institution has been borrowed.”   In the 18th Century, British Parliament impeached two men – both *former* officials.  https://t.co/ZAFHT8t6yX

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: You're going to hear a lot of bad faith arguments about impeachment.  Trump’s team will argue you can’t convict former officials or presidents.  But history shows otherwise! And the Founders disagreed, too.  Let's turn to 18th Century Britain. (Stay with me, folks)  🚨🚨🚨THREAD:  https://t.co/Kn7RwpQunO

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: If you threaten members with violence, spread dangerous conspiracies or heckle school shooting survivors, you should be expelled from your committees.  That's a principle both parties can stand by.  But @GOPLeader places little value on principle, when weighed against ambition.  https://t.co/w0HdHGoD0l

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump lost. Refused to accept the result. Spread lies. And then incited a violent mob to attack the Capitol.   If this is not impeachable, nothing is.  If he is not disqualified from future office and runs again, he will put the country through hell. Again.  He must be convicted.  https://t.co/8ogWm3hzgi

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Donald Trump politicized and abused intelligence while he was in office.  Donald Trump cannot be trusted with America’s secrets. Not then, and certainly not now.  Americans can sleep better at night knowing he will not receive classified briefings as an ex-president.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Kevin McCarthy on QAnon: "I don't even know what it is."  Donald Trump: "I don't know who Proud Boys are."   When your party is so beholden to violent fringe groups that your only defense is to play dumb, you are no longer a political party.  You are nothing more than a cult.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Voting a member off a committee is not something to take lightly.   But calling for the execution of elected officials and spouting violent and anti-Semitic conspiracies crosses every line.  She hasn’t apologized. She's only fanned the flames.  If @GOPLeader won’t act, we will.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Sending a free mask to every American would equip millions with the tools to keep safe, and send an important message:  Masks work.  I've been pushing for this since last summer, and recently urged @POTUS to increase distribution of high-quality masks.  Let's get it done.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: No matter what Trump claims, there’s no First Amendment right to incite an insurrection.  Just because Trump vocalized his corrupt intent doesn't mean it's protected "free speech."  There's no First Amendment defense to violating your Constitutional duty.  He should be convicted.  https://t.co/EiKPgH8YwO

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: As new COVID-19 variants spread, evidence shows that higher quality masks provide much better protection.  That's why @RepRoKhanna, @SenSanders, @SenBrianSchatz and I are urging @POTUS to increase the distribution and supply of higher filtration quality masks.  Mask up, America.  https://t.co/rFnrFod04t

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Donald Trump must never receive another intelligence briefing.  He has repeatedly proven he cannot be trusted. He incited an insurrection, and has done more than enough damage to our country.   We know Trump will abuse any intel for his own gain. He must not be given the chance.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: It’s not enough to protect our democracy. We must make it stronger.   HR 1 will:  🗳Expand the right to vote 🔒Protect our elections 💸End dark money in politics ⚖️Root out corruption and hold elected officials accountable  Our democracy belongs to the people. Let's act.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: When corporations and the wealthy want tax cuts, or when there's a vacancy on the Supreme Court, Senate Republicans move at the speed of light.   But when American families are in dire need of help, they ask, what’s the rush?   COVID relief is needed. Urgently. It’s time to act.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Maher Bitar is exceedingly smart, principled, insightful and strategic.  These attacks on his religion and ethnicity are beyond the pale.  NSC is fortunate to have people of his talent, just like we were.  Our nation is more secure because of patriotic public servants like him.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Here's the risk if Trump isn’t convicted:  A future president will try to overturn the election at the end of their term.  If they succeed, they’re president for life.  If they fail, and can’t be held to account, we can expect it to happen again.  There must be consequences.  https://t.co/hDDi5LREcy

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Some Republicans in Congress seem confused about what “unity” means.  They seem to think that if you don’t give them what they want, you’re not for unity.  That’s not unity, that’s my way or the highway.  We're in a crisis and Americans need help.    Let’s unite around that.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The Constitution and precedent are clear:  Impeachment after a president leaves office is valid.  And when a president incited an insurrection to thwart the transfer of power at the end of his term,  It’s required.  The Senate must uphold its oath to defend our democracy.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: President Biden has his priorities in order:  Speaking with our NATO allies before returning Putin’s call.  Calling out Putin on the hack, election meddling, bounties, and poisoning, all while pushing a new START treaty.  This is how a President asserts U.S. interests and values.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Patriotism knows no gender nor orientation.   Ending the transgender military ban is another vital step in restoring America’s promise of equality.   Anyone with the courage and sense of duty to serve this country should be allowed to do so — with our thanks and gratitude.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Russians are taking to the streets today in the freezing cold to peacefully demand freedom, human rights for all their citizens, an end to corruption, and the immediate release of Alexei @Navalny.   I stand with them. The United States, and the world, must stand with them, too.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Through his lies and provocations, Trump incited a mob to attack the peaceful transfer of power.   As House members, we did our job and impeached him.   It will soon be time for Senators to do theirs.  To protect the country, Trump must be disqualified from any further office.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The brutal murder of Jamal Khashoggi was an assault on human rights.  But for a year the Trump Admin refused to make public an unclassified report on Saudi Arabia's culpability.  I have asked Director Haines to declassify this report. There must be accountability and justice.  https://t.co/yr5fukB7vh

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: One year ago, the U.S. recorded its first COVID-19 case.  More than 410,000 deaths later, we finally have a national strategy.  The path forward won’t be easy. And the winter is going to be dark. But we will prioritize science, truth and transparency.  We will beat this virus.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: With this order, we once again put our faith in science and in our ability to adapt and overcome great difficulties.  We rejoin the world in protecting our planet for generations to come.  What we do to fight climate change will determine our legacy—  Or if we will even have one.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: For four years, intelligence professionals were battered and belittled by a President afraid of the truth.  Avril Haines will ensure that politics is kept out of their work, just as it should be.  Congratulations, @ODNIgov Director Haines, and look forward to our work together.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: America faces some of the gravest challenges in our history. We must act now.   Day 1: ✔️Mask mandate ✔️Ending the Muslim Ban ✔️Rejoining the Paris Climate Accords ✔️Pausing student loan payments ✔️Extending eviction moratorium   There is no time to waste.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: “Somehow we’ve weathered and witnessed,  A nation that isn't broken, but simply unfinished.”  “For there is always light,   If only we're brave enough to see it,   If only we're brave enough to be it.”  —@TheAmandaGorman  https://t.co/3fki2MELUY

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: For four years, our values and our democracy were under attack.  With difficulty, we withstood the assault.  But for the first time in a long time I’m breathing a sigh of relief.  Today marks the beginning of a national renewal.  The hopes of a nation are with you, Mr. President.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Steve Bannon is getting a pardon from Trump after defrauding Trump’s own supporters into paying for a wall that Trump promised Mexico would pay for.   And if that all sounds crazy, that’s because it is.  Thank God we have only 12 more hours of this den of thieves.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: For two years, I’ve fought to ensure accountability for Jamal Khashoggi’s brutal torture and murder.  We even mandated a public accounting in law. And for two years, the Trump Administration blocked us, and kept it classified.  This welcome change can’t come soon enough.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: 400,000 lives lost to COVID-19.   The death toll is staggering. For some, incomprehensible.  Unless you're one of the families in mourning.  Or have one of the 400,000 empty seats at your dinner table.   My heart goes out to everyone in pain. We will get through this, together.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: “Power at its best is love implementing the demands of justice, and justice at its best is power correcting everything that stands against love.” - Dr. King  On this #MLKDay, let us commit to taking on Dr. King’s unfinished work, using our power to create a more just society.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The insurrection was an act of domestic terrorism, fueled by white supremacism and incited by Trump.  It was also a massive intelligence and security failure.  What intel was gathered before Jan 6? Was it shared? Why wasn’t it acted upon? Were members involved?  We must find out.  https://t.co/gjYbYnNoJr

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Donald Trump should never receive another intelligence briefing — not now, and not in the future.  He cannot be trusted and has done enough damage to our country already.  Trump remains a security threat, and will continue to be a security threat long after he leaves office.  https://t.co/bCe7tm7eEb

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: This plan is a no brainer:  • New $2k relief checks • Expedited vaccine rollout • Eviction moratorium • Increased minimum wage to $15/hour  The road to recovery is long. But recovery is not the only goal.  We must create a better, more equitable and just society.  Let's go.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Yesterday, we impeached Donald Trump for the second time.  I hope that when we look back on the day we did so, it will be remembered as the day America got off the road to dictatorship and returned to the path of our Founders envisioned for us:  A democratic republic.  https://t.co/VGiDcW2VQr

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: For the fourth time in American history, and the second time in Donald Trump’s dangerous and destructive tenure, a president has been impeached.   We will defend our democracy against all threats, foreign and domestic.  Donald Trump must be removed, never to hold office again.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Let's talk about unity.  It’s not an empty talking point. It has to mean something.  We must be united against attacks on our democracy.   United against those who violate their oaths.  United against a president who incites a violent mob to overturn an election.  That's unity.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump incited an insurrection against a peaceful transfer of power.  And yet our democracy endures.  Throughout history, at every pivotal moment when evil threatened to overtake good, patriotic Americans stepped forward to say “enough.”  This is one of those moments.  Enough.  https://t.co/bArIDc5JCM

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump whipped up a mob into a frenzy. He told them to go to the Capitol and “fight like hell.”  And they did. With tragic results. And it could have been much, much worse.  Upholding our oath means recognizing that every second Trump is president, the nation is at risk.  Impeach.  https://t.co/Kckd9XcE26

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Handling a Senate trial is a grave responsibility.  But I know @RepRaskin, @RepDianaDeGette, @davidcicilline @JoaquinCastrotx, @RepSwalwell, @RepTedLieu, @StaceyPlaskett, @RepJoeNeguse and @RepDean will make the case.   This president must be held accountable and removed.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Incitement of insurrection is an impeachable offense.  No one contests that.   Either we uphold our oath to protect the constitution, or we do not.  Either we safeguard our democracy, or we do not.  It’s really that simple. Trump must be impeached. Now.  I know where I stand.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The 25th Amendment should be invoked, but if the Vice President refuses to do his duty, Congress will move with urgency to do ours.  Trump incited a violent insurrection, and for that he must be impeached.  Every day this man is in office, he is a grave danger to the nation.  https://t.co/Ugq5Y7dWKF

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: We can fortify the defenses of the Capitol.   We can reinforce doors and put up fences.  But we cannot guard our democracy against those who walk the halls of the Capitol, have taken an oath to uphold our Constitution, but refuse to do so.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The American people can expect the House will do its duty. And we will move swiftly.  But the Senate must undertake its Constitutional obligation, as well.  If McConnell stonewalls, he will bear responsibility for whatever dangerous acts this president commits in the days ahead.  https://t.co/zcIgYo2JcK

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Donald Trump spent years demagoguing, lying, spreading hate, and propagating conspiracies on Twitter. And worse, inciting violence.  Social media companies have allowed this vile content to fester for too long, and need to do much more.  But banning him is a good start.  https://t.co/bBvGtxeMMl

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The House should act to begin impeachment proceedings.  It's the only instrument wholly within our power to remove a president who has so manifestly and repeatedly violated the Constitution.  Every effort must be made to protect the country from further harm.  https://t.co/ym4YpiXkDd

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Donald Trump lit the fuse which exploded at the Capitol.  Every day that he remains in office, he is a danger to the Republic.  He should leave office immediately, through resignation, the 25th Amendment or impeachment.  My reflections from Wednesday:   https://t.co/Sv60pCW830  https://t.co/HvVMPpDlNK

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Yesterday, a seditious mob broke into the Capitol.  Spurred on by the President and inflamed by falsehoods told by his allies on Capitol Hill.  Look at the damage they have done.  To the Capitol, and to the country.   It must end.  https://t.co/l5Nd9wL9qH

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Hi folks, my staff and I are safe. Thanks to the Capitol Police.   A violent mob won’t stop us from upholding our constitutional duty to certify the election.  This is a moment when everyone must decide whether our democracy is worth protecting.  I believe it is.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Congress was once the place of giants.  Have we become so small? Does our oath to uphold the Constitution, taken just days ago, mean so very little?  I think not.  It has never been our place to overturn an election.  As long as we hope to remain a democracy, it never will be.  https://t.co/G3y7OQVrwI

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: We are witnessing nothing less than an attack on the bedrock of our democratic process — our free and fair elections.   So I wanted to take some time to walk you through exactly what is going on today in Washington D.C. and how we got here:  https://t.co/qcoFHR9pD9

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: He has betrayed our national security, and he will do so again.  He has compromised our elections, and he will do so again.  You will not change him. You cannot constrain him.   Truth matters little to him. What's right matters even less. And decency not at all.  Enough.  https://t.co/oSr0N72Bit

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: .@SpeakerPelosi led us through the last four dark years with great intellect, sharp tactics, and, of course, her huge heart.  As we confront COVID-19, climate change, healthcare and inequality, our Caucus trusts in her leadership.  Congrats, Madam Speaker! The work continues.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump’s contempt for democracy is laid bare. Once again. On tape.  Pressuring an election official to “find” the votes so he can win is potentially criminal,  And another flagrant abuse of power by a corrupt man who would be a despot, if we allowed him.  We will not.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Last year, we proved Donald Trump guilty of abusing the power of his office.  But Republican Senators refused to convict, claiming on principle, voters should decide.  Now, those same Senators wish to overturn the election results.  They have no principle, only fear and ambition.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: 2020 challenged us all in so many ways, revealing stresses on our democracy, disparities in our justice system, and terrible inequities in public health.  But America is resilient. And in 2021, we'll build back better. We must.   Here's to a better year ahead.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: For years, Republicans were obedient to Trump’s every whim.  They stood by his failed COVID response. His lies. His impeachment. His corrupt pardons. His efforts to overturn the election.  But $2,000 checks to help Americans? That’s where they draw the line?  Pass the bill.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: I just voted YES to give $2,000 to each American.  This is an unprecedented crisis. The relief must meet the scale of suffering.  Republicans didn’t balk at a $2.2 trillion tax cut for millionaires and big corporations.  So, let's get families the help they need to survive. Now.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Democrats will vote today to give $2,000 to each American.  Republicans have repeatedly blocked it — during negotiations and on the House floor.  They will get one more chance.  Do they want each American to get $2,000 to help get them through this pandemic?  Yes or no?

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Good news: After pointless histrionics, Trump finally signed the relief bill with unemployment, rental and food assistance, and an eviction moratorium.  Bad news: Republicans are still blocking $2,000 for every American.  Families need more help. This is about survival.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: While the President golfs:  Over 10 million people are going to lose unemployment benefits.  States aren’t getting funding to distribute vaccines.  The eviction moratorium will soon expire.  Families are hungry.  Does he know? Does he care?  Get off the golf cart. Sign the bill.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: To everyone celebrating today, I want to wish you a very Merry Christmas, even if your celebrations look different than usual and you're joining loved ones by Zoom.   This has been a long and difficult year, but I hope this holiday brings you and your loved ones peace and joy.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Black Americans get worse medical care because of the color of their skin.  Even a medical degree couldn't save Dr. Moore from this injustice.  I introduced the Equal Health Care For All Act, because equitable care is a civil right.  It’s time we treated it that way.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: During the Mueller investigation, Trump’s lawyer floated a pardon to Manafort.  Manafort withdrew his cooperation with prosecutors, lied, was convicted, and then Trump praised him for not “ratting.”  Trump’s pardon now completes the corrupt scheme.  Lawless until the bitter end.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Listen, Democrats have been fighting for bigger relief checks for months.  All while Trump was missing in action — playing golf, lying about the election, pardoning crooks.  If he’s serious about the checks, he needs to get Republicans out of the way.   Let’s make this happen.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Lie to cover up for the president? You get a pardon.  Corrupt politician who endorsed Trump? You get a pardon.  Murder innocent civilians? You get a pardon.  Elect a corrupt man as president?  You get a corrupt result.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: I voted YES to provide:  $300 per week in supplemental unemployment benefits.  $600 in direct payments to most Americans.  Billions for small businesses, renters and vaccines.  It’s not enough—and should’ve been done months ago—but this deal will help Americans get through this.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: This week, Republicans objected to giving workers $1,200 checks to pay rent and feed their families.  Why?   “The deficit.”  They didn’t care about the deficit when they passed $2 trillion in tax cuts for big corporations and millionaires.  The biggest deficit is in their values.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: I held a virtual town hall last night with Dr. Armand Dorian of @KeckMedUSC, and I was so moved by what he said:  "It took me 20 years of education to have the honor of saving lives. But you have the ability to save a life by just wearing a mask."  Trust in science. Wear a mask.  https://t.co/fUiFpbvsYr

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: A year ago today, Donald Trump became only the third president in American history to be impeached.  We knew that conviction was an uphill battle, but we also knew the damage he’d do if left in office.  In America, we fight for our democracy.   Because in America, right matters.  https://t.co/tU2rrUCFgS

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Eight months ago, Americans got $1200 checks.   Since then, Democrats have been fighting to get more.   More unemployment help. More for money to pay for food and rent.   But Mitch McConnell just kept saying no, no, no.   Americans need help, and we must get it to them now.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: That multiple effective vaccines were developed and produced within 1 year is miraculous.   It's also a testament to science.   To decades of vaccine research. To the dedication of scientists and researchers. To the courage of clinical trial volunteers.  We will get through this.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The electoral college has spoken. Our democracy endures.  Despite rampant misinformation and baseless claims,  We, the people, made our voices heard.  But we have also seen that our democracy is not guaranteed. Every generation must protect and defend it.  And we will.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Attorney General Bill Barr:  Lied to cover for Trump.  Launched political investigations.  Subverted justice and the rule of law.  And violently cracked down on protestors.  So good riddance.  Now, the work of restoring a credible and independent justice system must begin.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The authorization of the first vaccine against COVID is an incredible milestone that will save countless lives.  But this is not time to relax. The virus is spreading at a higher rate than ever before.  Mask. Social distance. Stay healthy and protect others. We can do it.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The Texas case was not a close call. At all.  Just an effort to overturn a democratic election dressed up in shabby legal clothing.   Republicans who supported it compromised their beliefs, ideology, and oaths.  They stand for nothing. Care about nothing.  Except themselves.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Hanukkah may look a little different this year, but even if you're lighting the menorah and frying up the first batch of latkes over Zoom, I hope you and your loved ones can find moments of joy and light tonight.   From my family to yours, wishing you a Happy Hanukkah!

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: This isn’t a game. Trump lost. End of story.  But he’s still trying to drag down our democracy, invalidate millions of votes, and overturn the election.  And for what? To raise money? To run again?  These members of Congress should be ashamed. History will remember the enablers.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Demanding governors overturn results.  Coercing state election officials.  Insisting state legislators appoint new electors.   Trump lost, and these attacks will not succeed.    But if you believe in democracy, silence is complicity.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Biden so far:   A economic team focused on helping workers, raising wages, and improving the economy for all.   A healthcare team that will trust science and listen to the experts.   A national security team that is experienced and ethical.   What a difference. In a great way.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: It's been eight long months since the last direct payments for COVID relief were made to Americans.   Families and workers are hurting. Cases are rising and the economy is stalling.   It's clear Americans need financial support—now.   Let's get it done.

tweet: When given the opportunity to purchase additional vaccine doses, Trump passed.   And now, fewer Americans will be vaccinated before June.   Make no mistake, Trump's incompetence will cost American lives. It already has.   So much for America first.

tweet: The surge in COVID cases in our region is dangerous. Hospitals are becoming overwhelmed, deaths are rising.  A vaccine is coming, but it’s not here yet. We have to stop the spread. Stay home if you can. Wear your mask. Follow public health guidance.  We can do this. We have to.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Our economic recovery is stalling, just as we enter winter with record infections and deaths.  We have a responsibility to get the American people the help they need. Now.  The $900 billion Senate compromise is a good starting point. Let’s get it done.

tweet: Trump misled the country in February when he downplayed the severity of the virus, but told Bob Woodward that COVID-19 was deadly, airborne, and worse than any flu.  That he is still lying about the virus, with 200,000 Americans dead and no end in sight, is simply monstrous:

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Another tragic milestone: 200,000 Americans have died of coronavirus.  It is difficult to grasp the enormity of this loss. And it’s even more difficult to reckon with the fact this tragedy was avoidable, if we had competent presidential leadership.  It didn’t have to be this way.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Mr. President, this is low. Even for you.   No, I didn’t write Ruth Bader Ginsburg’s dying wish to a nation she served so well, and spent her whole life making a more perfect union.  But I am going to fight like hell to make it come true.  No confirmation before inauguration.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Election Day is 43 days away. And our health is on the ballot.   To nominate and confirm a new Justice with a lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court — to repeal our healthcare before the election — is an affront to voters.   There must be no confirmation before inauguration.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: America lost a giant. Ruth Bader Ginsburg was shunned from courtrooms when she began her career because she was a woman.   But she persisted, blazing a trail for millions of women and others who had been excluded or oppressed.  RBG is a lioness of the law. She is irreplaceable.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: As my family joins families across America tonight in celebrating Rosh Hashanah,   I want to extend my best wishes for a sweet and happy New Year – especially during these difficult times, when we can all use a little joy and comfort.   L'shanah tovah!

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump knew how deadly COVID-19 was in February.  Not only did he downplay it, he blocked steps that would have saved lives.  @RepRoKhanna and I have bills to send masks to the American people, just as the USPS wanted to do in April.  It made sense then, and it still does.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump encouraged us to take unproven drugs, mocked wearing masks and mused about injecting bleach. He knew how deadly COVID was, and lied.  Stop playing games with our lives, Mr. Trump. Enough of the false claims and false promises.   We’ll trust the science, thank you very much.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Never Again only happens when we learn from history’s darkest moments. Otherwise we're doomed to repeat them.  Autocracy is on the rise globally. White nationalism & anti-Semitism have reared their ugly heads at home.  We must strengthen Holocaust education. We must never forget.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: As fall approaches, let’s recall how Longfellow once voiced his hope for America, and make that vision a reality:  “Sail on, oh ship of State! Sail on, oh Union, strong and great! Humanity with all its fears, with all the hopes of future years, is hanging breathless on thy fate!”

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: If true, it’s unthinkable, abhorrent, and a grievous human rights violation.   Cruelty and dehumanization of the most vulnerable have been a constant feature of Trump’s immigration policy.   But performing involuntary hysterectomies on immigrants?   We need a full investigation.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Mitch McConnell’s legislative graveyard:  Trillions in coronavirus relief: 121 days  Expanding voting rights: 281 days  Protecting elections: 326 days  Lowering drug prices: 486 days  Protecting coverage for preexisting conditions: 493 days  Universal background checks: 564 days

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Praying for the two deputies who were shot in an apparent ambush, and thinking of their loved ones tonight.  Every day, law enforcement officers put themselves at risk to protect our community.  I hope the perpetrator of this cowardly attack can be quickly brought to justice.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The best defense we have against COVID-19 is science.  And from the beginning, Trump has marginalized and attacked experts.  That’s why the U.S. has fared worse than any other developed nation. 190,000 Americans have died.  How many more have to die until Trump understands?

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Thousands of inmates put their lives on the line to protect their fellow Californians every fire season, but are barred from pursuing firefighting after they serve their time.  It was long past time to fix this injustice and help protect Californians.  Restorative justice works.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Bill Barr uses the DOJ as a shield to protect Trump,  But also as a sword to go after Trump’s “enemies list.”   The Durham investigation was political from the start and issuing “findings" before the election would violate DOJ policy.   No wonder career prosecutors are resigning.  https://t.co/bzsUd4iote

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: 19 years ago, tragedy struck our shores.  On the anniversary of 9/11, we remember the almost 3,000 lives lost and the courage displayed by first responders.  We honor those we lost, the fathers and mothers, brothers and sisters, friends, neighbors, fellow Americans. #NeverForget.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The Saudi Crown Prince was responsible for the brutal torture and execution of journalist and U.S. resident Jamal Khashoggi.  Then Trump bragged that he "saved his ass."  Once again, Trump displays his infatuation for autocrats.  And his utter contempt for basic human decency.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: In February, Trump told a reporter COVID-19 was "more deadly than even your strenuous flu."  But publicly, he was calling it "totally under control" and it would miraculously "disappear."  Trump knew and did nothing. He’s a disgrace.  And now, nearly 190,000 Americans are dead.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: We’ve received a whistleblower complaint alleging DHS suppressed intel reports on Russian election interference, altered intel to match false Trump claims and made false statements to Congress.  This puts our national security at risk. We will investigate:  https://t.co/Z7npo3P6zv

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: It is not the job of the Department of Justice to represent the president in a civil case.  Especially not one accusing Trump of sexual assault prior to holding office.  But under Barr, the DOJ no longer represents the American people, or justice.  Trump finally got his Roy Cohn.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: This is good news. These benefits will reach many Californians who desperately need help.   But it's no substitute for reauthorizing the full unemployment benefits that Senate Republicans let expire.   And it still leaves behind mixed income earners. I have a bill to fix that.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Everyone should be able to vote by mail.  And Election Day should be a national holiday.  Voting should be accessible and safe for all.  The only reason to oppose both?  If you don’t want more people to vote.  RT if you agree.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: California is on fire — again.   Climate change is making California's fire season longer and deadlier. And it will only get worse if we don’t act.   We simply cannot wait for future generations to tackle climate change.   We need a Green New Deal.  https://t.co/a9tVONoREo

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: On #LaborDay, we honor those who fought to improve workers' rights and recognize all the work that remains to be done to build an economy that works for all Americans:  Protecting the right to collectively bargain. Securing a livable wage. Equal pay for equal work.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The swamp in action:  DeJoy pressures his employees to make political contributions, and allegedly illegally reimburses them.  Trump appoints him head of USPS, where he degrades mail services that Americans need to vote.  This report demands a full, independent investigation.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Russia is once again interfering in our elections to sow discord and help Trump.  In particular, Russia may be echoing destructive and false narratives about voting by mail pushed by the President.  No wonder Donald Trump refuses to stand up to Putin. The Kremlin is on his side.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump will never understand why people serve, sacrifice and care for more than themselves.  “Why should I go to that cemetery? It’s filled with losers.”  "What was in it for them?”  "I like people who weren’t captured.”  We owe those who served and died a debt we can never repay.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump has been clamoring for investigations into his “political enemies.”   He accuses them of treason. Literally.  And Barr contends there’s nothing political about the “report” Trump demanded?  There has never been a more duplicitous Attorney General.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The Trump Administration announced they're ending election security briefings for Congress.  Now, it appears they suppressed intelligence suggesting Russia is amplifying smears against Biden.  We will get to the bottom of this, so the American people are not left in the dark.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Democracy belongs to the people. And so does the intelligence about foreign election interference.  Americans have a right to know how foreign actors are attempting to interfere with our elections.  The Director of National Intelligence must resume briefings without delay:  https://t.co/aSradGQLsf

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Last week, our family said goodbye to our beloved dog Mia after 13 and a half joyful years.  These past few months, we were lucky to get so much quality time with Mia at home. tweet: As massive demonstrations continue against a fraudulent election and a corrupt autocratic regime in Belarus,   Lukashenko is now expelling foreign journalists — a potential prelude to a further violent crackdown.   A free press is essential to democracy. It must be protected.

tweet: Michael Flynn lied to the FBI, and plead guilty. Twice.   Then Trump and Barr intervened.   Here’s what today’s decision means:  There should be one standard of justice, and the court doesn’t need to take Barr’s false representations at face value.    A victory for rule of law.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: When neo-Nazis marched on Charlottesville, killing a peaceful protester, Trump said there were "very fine people on both sides.”  Now, one of his supporters murdered two protesters and he insinuates it was self-defense.  Trump fuels, condones and enables this kind of violence.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: You spent four years defending the indefensible,   You invented “alternate facts,”   And you enabled a corrupt president who preaches hatred and bigotry.   But seriously, best of luck after the White House, Kellyanne.   Try to get reacquainted with the truth.

tweet: The ODNI has cancelled all further briefings on foreign election interference.   The Administration clearly does not want Congress or the country informed of what Russia is doing. name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The law prohibits using taxpayer resources to promote a campaign. Period.   Breaking the law should never be a “model."   Upholding, cherishing and strengthening the rule of law should be.   Trump has nothing but disdain for democratic values. It will be up to us to restore them.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Bounties on U.S. troops. Election interference. Injuring our soldiers.  Yet again, Trump is shamefully silent.  Trump will never stand up to Russia and Vladimir Putin.  And because Republicans refuse to stand up to Trump,  They too put our democracy – and our troops – in danger.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Other nations contained COVID and saved lives with widespread testing and tracing.  But Trump’s lack of strategy has led to tens of thousands of deaths, and now they appear to be ordering less testing.  They’re ok with more loss of life.   Just as long as Trump doesn’t look bad.

name: Adam Schiff

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump believes he’s above the law. Meadows says no one cares.   They’re wrong.  This law exists because tax dollars shouldn’t be subsidizing the president’s re-election campaign.  Like last night.   And Americans do care about the rule of law – even if it means nothing to Trump.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Last night, police shot Jacob Blake 7 times at close range. The horrific video is tragically reminiscent of previous unjustifiable police violence.   Jacob is in critical condition, and I am praying for his recovery. A full and independent investigation must be conducted.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: These numbers represent veterans and seniors who aren’t getting the medications they need.  Small businesses who are losing money from delayed packages.  And if we don’t act, millions of voters whose votes might not be counted.  We must expose the truth and save the USPS.

tweet: BREAKING: The House just voted to save the USPS from sabotage by the Trump Administration.   We will protect our postal service:   For veterans. For small businesses. For rural Americans. For our very democracy.  Everyday Americans need the USPS — we won't let Trump destroy it.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Bannon was arrested in only the latest scam by Trump’s den of thieves.  For the President and his cronies, there is no end to the cycle of greed, deception, corruption, indictment and conviction.  Everything they do is to enrich themselves. name: Adam Schiff
tweet: On top of a deadly pandemic and heatwave, Californians are now facing dangerous wildfires statewide.  My heart goes out to all the families facing new and compounded fears for their safety.  We are deeply grateful to the brave firefighters risking their lives to protect us all.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The apparent poisoning of Russian opposition leader Alexei Navalny calls to mind other Russian activists who have been targeted by Putin in barbaric fashion.  The Kremlin must allow his medical evacuation immediately, so he can be treated and the cause of his illness identified.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump’s personal lawyer: Guilty.  Trump’s campaign manager: Guilty.  Trump’s deputy campaign manager: Guilty.  Trump’s National Security Advisor: Guilty.  Trump’s political advisor: Guilty.  And now, Trump’s chief strategist: Indicted.  A pattern of lies, graft and corruption.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The Postmaster General has spent months ripping out sorting machines, removing collection boxes, and prohibiting overtime.  A promise to not make it any worse until after November 3 isn’t going to cut it.  Not for voters. Not for veterans. And not for Americans who need the USPS.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: I've received more than 4,000 emails and calls about the USPS:   Small business owners who are losing money. Veterans who are waiting weeks to receive medication. Citizens who are afraid their vote won't be counted.   America needs the USPS. We won't let Trump destroy it.  https://t.co/MYacMrsfht

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Is there no American institution, nothing that makes this country unique and beautiful, that Trump does not seek to destroy?   The vast, pristine Arctic National Wildlife Refuge is just the latest.  The damage done by this Administration to our planet will take decades to repair.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: The Postmaster General must resign.  He’s slowed delivery, banned overtime & decommissioned mail-sorting machines.  Right before the election. During a pandemic.  The House must demand answers. Hearings should start now. It can’t wait.  We won’t let Trump destroy the Post Office.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Has there ever been a president so utterly devoid of scruple, so naked in his ambition to steal an election?  Trump is so terrified of losing that he'll take the entire system down with him.   Our post office. Our elections. Our very democracy.  His depravity is boundless.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump’s promises aren’t worth the paper they’re written on.   First, he was going to extend unemployment benefits.   Then he said he would cut them to $400.   A couple days later, it’s $300, with millions ineligible.   By next week, he’ll be sending Americans IOUs.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump's assault on critical environmental protections continues.  Why? Because Obama wrote them and Trump's big donors hate them.  The planet is paying the price for Trump's pettiness and disdain for nature. We must reverse course.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Belarus has been referred to as Europe’s longest lasting dictatorship under the brutal, corrupt rule of Lukashenko.  After another fraudulent election, Belarusians are peacefully calling for freedom and democracy.  America and democracies around the world must stand with them.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Donald Trump has never deterred Russia from interfering in U.S. elections.  Far from it.  The sum total of Trump's words and actions has only encouraged Russian meddling in our elections.  Insecure, unscrupulous and transactional, Trump is Putin’s ideal American president.  https://t.co/x61qph1Z95

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: By slowing down deliveries, prohibiting overtime, and freezing hiring,  Trump’s handpicked donor is sabotaging the USPS during a pandemic, and just before an election when its services are even more vital.  We must save the Postal Service to protect our democracy.  And we will.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump’s executive orders from the golf club:  Cut unemployment benefits for millions.  Reduce funding for Social Security and Medicare.  Do nothing to treat the virus, open schools, or help people vote.  What’s next for Trump while millions of Americans suffer?  The back nine.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Trump says “I don’t care what anybody says” when intel agencies disclosed Russia is interfering in our election to hurt Biden.  Of course he doesn’t.  He has solicited foreign help again and again.  From Russia, Ukraine & China.  He doesn’t care about our democracy. Only himself.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Another court victory: Trump's former White House counsel Don McGahn must testify before Congress.   But it's been over a year since he was subpoenaed—exactly what Trump wanted.  We must reform the law to expedite Congressional subpoenas so no president can run out the clock.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Once again, a principled, patriotic public servant has come forward to expose Trump's abuse of power.   Once again, Trump sought to use the levers of power not to advance the country’s interests, but to help himself.  Trump’s only foreign policy: line my pockets or help me cheat.

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: Lebanon is among the many countries already facing enormous health and economic consequences of COVID, compounded by refugee crises and more.  My thoughts are with Lebanon after today's horrific explosion. The international community must come to the aid of the Lebanese people.

name: Adam Schiff

Slow the testing down.  (Deadly.)   And now: "It is what it is."  Americans are paying the price.  https://t.co/fZCO9y4IBR

name: Adam Schiff
tweet: We have lost more than 155,000 Americans to COVID-19.  Families are mourning. Friends are unable to gather to remember their lives. Communities are torn apart.  It doesn’t have to be this way. Let’s all do our part to halt the spread, stop this virus and remember those we lost.

name: Adam Schiff

tweet: The Presidential Daily Brief is the gold standard for intelligence analysts— a "hoax" would never be included.
